scenes.title: The Interrogation
scenes.biggestGap: The ward room and release beats need more sovereign border texture and more physical support under the interrogation exchange.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Warded holding circle and yard inside the Thalassian Pass border system.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Warm stone, ward-blue light, anchor stone, confiscated satchel and map, light horse tack waiting outside.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina reads pressure through teeth, jaw, and ward lattice behavior, and keeps translating herself down for soldiers until Sylvanas proves she can keep up.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Cyndia at the door, Sylvanas at the ward edge, the map against the wall, the staff withheld, the barrier drop waiting under every exchange.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Barrier gone, raw leyline noise flooding back, horses already being assembled for the south road.

scenes.title: The Road to Millhaven
scenes.biggestGap: The ride needs stronger route texture and more recurring contact between Jaina's theory talk, the escort formation, and the sick countryside.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: South road out of Thalassian Pass through thinning wards, tree-line change, and farm country toward Millhaven.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Staff crystal, reins, quiet buckles, packed dirt, trough water, crop heads, shuttered farm doors.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina tracks pulses, gaps, and system spread before she reads social texture, and she keeps learning the field through what Sylvanas and the rangers are already doing.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Mid-ride explanation pinned to tack rhythm, reins checks, widening escort spacing, and Sylvanas's map-based correction.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Millhaven appearing by the river with a still wheel, cold chimneys, and no light for the road.

scenes.title: The Wildlife Attack
scenes.biggestGap: The attack already lands, but the carcass diagnosis and Millhaven approach need stronger tactile and environmental carry-through so the chapter closes on place, not abstraction.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Road verge and treeline outside Millhaven at dusk, then the village approach by the river bend.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Arrow shafts, blood on dirt, frozen road, carcass hide and pulse, leather reins, still mill wheel.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina's diagnostic contact with living flesh under necromantic pressure; she can read the mechanism's effects but not yet its carrier.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Sylvanas's clipped field orders, Lyriel and Cyndia's shots, Neral steadying the horses, and Jaina's answer given with one hand still on the carcass.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The party riding into Millhaven's hush with the river sounding thin and wrong under shut houses.
